persona: This customer prioritizes realistic appearance and styling flexibility in wigs, and is dissatisfied with products that lack customization options or reveal visible construction details, indicating a preference for high-quality, natural-looking wigs with versatile styling potential.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Beautiful Wig! (especially for the price) This wig is DEF a buy! It's a light Swiss lace with a large amount of parting space on the crown.
Several inches of ventilation on the sides with varied tying to create a more natural hairline.
Pre-cut baby hairs at the nape of the neck!
Super soft! Doesn't seem to tangle easily. It's very easy to comb my hands through.
The color is a beautiful ashy blonde. A cool, 613 color, with nice dimension to it.
Overall, a defi... Review 2: rating 5.0. Very pretty! Minimal shedding! This blonde color is super platinum and beautiful, thick and full with minimal shedding, glad I purchased! Review 3: rating 5.0. WOW [[VIDEOID:104bd4b0c214449de22e3843906e08db]] Wow is all i can say! When you see wigs on here for such a good deal it sometimes seems too good to be true. I am completely in love with this wig! I am attaching a picture and a short video. The picture is after I cut the lace, put on a wig cap to cover my half black hair, used a small amount of hair glue and then blended in with my foundation. The video is before I finsihed cutting the lace and did all of the above. First, I am a HUG... Review 4: rating 5.0. Great quality for the price I wore it for Halloween as the Mother of Dragons and it was perfect! The color and curl pattern were just right. The hair feels nice compared to those cheap costume stores. Review 5: rating 5.0. Amazing Great quality for such cheap price ! I love it Review 6: rating 5.0. Great wig Looks so real. I love it Review 7: rating 5.0. Great bang for your buck; beautiful blonde shade. I will update after a few more wears, but so far, so good.
I cut it, did a curl set and steamed the curls with a clothing steamer to set and brushed out.
The shade of blonde is very pretty, it is sort of a lightest ash blonde, not entirely platinum but not as yellow as a #613.
It has dimension and just the right amount of shine.
Super soft.
It will obviously tangle, being so long and synthetic, but so far I wo... Review 8: rating 5.0. Decent Wig for it’s price This was my first time ever using a front lace wig, I did have a little trouble getting the wig to sit against my forehead smoothly without glue while also trying to make it look natural. It does tangle a little bit and sheds a bit aswell while trying to style it, but for $35 this is a pretty decent wig! If you’re constantly using wigs and know what youre doing I’d say this would probably look amazing. It is a little heavy but not to where it’s bothersome. I... Review 9: rating 5.0. Cosplayer Approved! I live for this wig- I wear it all the time for fun, and I have several cosplay plans involving it. I can wear it for long periods of time, and it fits and sticks like a charm with just a little bit of spirit gum. It’s a bit blonder than it looks in the pictures, but it still works perfectly. Review 10: rating 1.0. Do not buy! If i could rate it zero stars i would! It was choppy and uneven not one length and the tracks were showing. And the lace was dirty looking. It was disgusting! Review 11: rating 3.0. Damaged? Prepurchased? Or just made from bad hair? I believe this wig would have been pretty damn good if it hadn’t been worn before me or some how damaged before getting to me. I don’t know what the case is I just know there were two spots inside the cap where the clips to adjust the cap are that were visibly dirty. And once the wig was on the entire top back half of the wig is all broken little hairs that stick straight up making the wig look tore up for being brand new. Also as so... Review 12: rating 5.0. Hands down the best wig ever!!! I have been buying wigs for about 7 years now and I can honestly say this is the best quality wig I have gotten yet. This is the second time I have purchased this wig and definitely will be purchasing again. The hair is so soft, the hairline is realistic and doesn’t shed or tangle. Every other wig I have purchased I have had to add hair to, fix the hairline and cut. I didn’t have to do anything to this wig... it’s PERFECT!! And the price can’t be be... Review 13: rating 1.0. I feel duped! I am a female suffering with embarrassing hair loss and this was my first wig. I bought it for myself after reading extensive reviews and looking for weeks I chose this wig.
I regret it and here's why:
-You can't style it or part it realistically.
-Even when left down you still end up seeing the tracks by everyday movement.
-It tangled instantly & requires constant brushing.
-its too tight and uncomfortable for 23" head

Even after I c... Review 14: rating 1.0. DO NOT BUY FOR THIS AMOUNT Ran fingers through once and it was shedding and tangled but described as resilient! Review 15: rating 1.0. Not worth it It's very bulky and heavy. Nothing at all like the description said. It sheds so much hair and it does not cover all my hair. Review 16: rating 1.0. The Wig You Receive is NOT the Wig in the Pictures I had never returned an Amazon product before, but what I received was so ridiculous that I decided it had to be returned. The wig that you receive is nothing at all like the product photographs. I don't know how Amazon has not demanded this seller upload more truthful imagery, especially considering the price. The quality is like a cheap Halloween costume wig you'd buy at a Dollar General for a few bucks. The hair strands resemble f... Review 17: rating 3.0. No parting space The wig is very soft, looks beautiful,but there is absolutely no parting space. Like absolutely none. You can only wear it like in one style that will hide the tracks. That cute little braid up style looks a mess in real life because all everyone can see is the weave tracks. Near the weave tracks the hair is not so silky. The wig would be perfect if it had some parting space and more lace in the front. Review 18: rating 1.0. Terrible quality Ordered 2 wigs and the quality was absolutely horrible and looked super fake. And the hairline and style wasn't as shown in pictures. Will never order again. Review 19: rating 1.0. Terrible quality Ordered 2 wigs and the quality was absolutely horrible and looked super fake. And the hairline and style wasn't as shown in pictures. Will never order again. Review 20: rating 1.0. Terrible quality Ordered 2 wigs and the quality was absolutely horrible and looked super fake. And the hairline and style wasn't as shown in pictures. Will never order again.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Not that great I was under the impression that this would be an amazing wig. It’s parted in the middle and you can’t style it any other way. When you bring the hair forward you can see the wets on the back of the wig.

persona: This customer values aesthetically pleasing products and is motivated by gifting occasions, preferring items that convey thoughtfulness and emotional appeal.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Nice product This bracelet is very pretty and delicate, the customer service for this company is fantastic also. I must have exceptionally small wrists because it is still a little large on me, but not a huge deal. Would definitely purchase from this company again.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Very Nice Bracelet This bracelet exceeds my expectations.  It's intricately carved and even though it's not real silver, it is beautiful.  Nice shiny, consistent finish.  It arrived on time and in excellent condition.  I recommend it and would buy from this company again.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Five Stars Beautiful bracelet in very good price. My wife loved it.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Five Stars Amazing product for the money. Looks beautiful.

Review 5: rating 3.0. Three Stars Makes my wrist fahbulous.. :-)

Review 6: rating 5.0. “I have small wrists so this is perfect and I like that it is not real heavy “I have small wrists so this is perfect and I like that it is not real heavy.”  In addition living a very warm climate heavy jewelry is just too much. This bracelet is stylish and timeless.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Five Stars Beautiful bracelet, excellent price. Wear it all the time.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Love! beautiful bracelet and arrived quickly. Just as shown here, and goes great with many outfits. Love it!

Review 9: rating 5.0. I thought this was really nice that they expressed concern over quality and customer satisfaction The seller sent an email prior to the arrival of the braclet with contact information should there be any problem. I thought this was really nice that they expressed concern over quality and customer satisfaction. This braclet is pretty and I really like it. It does bend to fit your wrist as needed. I am please with the purchase.”

Review 10: rating 5.0. Five Stars I love this silver cuff, it has beautiful scrolling and is just the right size!

Review 11: rating 5.0. Five Stars received the bracelet very quickly and I absolutely love the cuff, would recommend it

Review 12: rating 5.0. very comfortable to wear I received my order within days!  it is lovely for the price, very comfortable to wear!

Review 13: rating 5.0. Bracelet was really cute and a great deal. It was a gift and my sister ... Bracelet was really cute and a great deal.  It was a gift and my sister really liked it.  But I was also very impressed by Smitco...they sent me information and told me to let them know if there was a problem.  Great customer service.  Will definitely use them again.

Review 14: rating 5.0. I received the bracelet and it looks beautiful. I'm giving it as a Christmas present and ... I received the bracelet and it looks beautiful.  I'm giving it as a Christmas present and think she will love it

Review 15: rating 4.0. Great gift Very pretty bracelet, bought for my 16 year old niece, this is something I think she could wear for years to come. Wish I had bought one for myself! Item is as pictured and much more solid and sturdy than what I expected, given that the price was relatively inexpensive. Nicely boxed also. I can get it on and off easily but I wasn't worried about it coming off. Very nice product, thanks.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Five Stars very pretty, excited to give to my sister in law for Christmas!

persona: This customer prioritizes accurate product representation and durability, is influenced by visual alignment with product images, and values consistency with original parts; they are skeptical of quality when specifications don’t match expectations and may reconsider future purchases based on long-term performance.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Liked the construction -- better than the one that came ... Filter fit perfectly.  Liked the construction -- better than the one that came with the dryer many years ago.

Review 2: rating 5.0. fits great! This fits perfectly in my Whirlpool Estate dryer. So happy with it.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Great product - great price. This worked great. It fit our Kitchenaide dryer perfectly. It arrived on time in excellent condition.

Review 4: rating 3.0. Needed a slight modification to fit the slot I gave it only 3 stars because it didn't quite fit into the slot of my 10 year-old Whirlpool dryer. It's slightly wider by about 1/16 of an inch but the thickness and length is correct. The bottom part of the corners are squared whereas the original were rounded. (I'd replaced the original lint trap screen once before when I bought it locally from Sears 4 years ago and it fit perfectly, but it's currently out of stock.)  I've since used so...

Review 5: rating 2.0. Two Stars materials are not like origional a real cheap copy.

Review 6: rating 1.0. thick is good for stability but it was thicker than my old ... The handle portion is so small that it doesn't cover the opening in my dryer.  The materials are flimsy and cracked at every turn.  I could live with those things considering this was an inexpensive item for an old dryer.  But the real problem is that the plastic of the main section was too thick.  Yes, thick is good for stability but it was thicker than my old one and nothing I possibly did could get it into the dryer.  ...

Review 7: rating 1.0. One Star Generic didn't even fit properly

Review 8: rating 2.0. This bends too easily, and it doesn't quite fit all the way ... This bends too easily, and it doesn't quite fit all the way into the filter tray. I will have to replace this one sooner than I'd like.

Review 9: rating 2.0. Does not actually replace the part as an exact fit ... Does not actually replace the part as an exact fit.  Thankfully someone else wrote a review stating that some modification was needed. If the model  of dryer is old enough, you may need to carve the corners at the opposite end of the handle. I scoured a 45 degree angle on both sides and then used pliers to create a clean break along the line.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Garbage Junk.  Packaging was useless.  Item bent under its own weight.  Original lint screen has lasted since the dryer was new 28 years ago.  This lasted less than 5 seconds.

Review 11: rating 1.0. One Star Cheap. It actually reflect the price I paid for it. Flimsy...

Review 12: rating 1.0. One Star Broke 1st time we pulled it out of dryer.

Review 13: rating 2.0. Two Stars It will suffice in the short term. Not OEM quality materials - rather flimsy.

Review 14: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money warped / melted  after using it a few times.  Don't waste your money.

Review 15: rating 1.0. Wouldn't recommend buying this Cheaply made, doesn't catch lint, has already split apart. Wouldn't recommend buying this. Spend more and get something better through someone else

Review 16: rating 5.0. Fits and way cheaper than buying OEM This doesn't have the same handle that my original filter had, but it does what it needs to do and it doesn't bother me a bit that it isn't exactly the same. I'm not into spending a ton on a dryer filter, so this does just the trick.

Review 17: rating 2.0. Two Stars It was a good price but is already cracking around the edges of the screen

Review 18: rating 2.0. Best choice for my 31 year old dryer An after market part designed to fit several brands and models. Out of the package not shaped exactly like the OEM. With a couple uses and the heat the plastic is subjected to by the dryer, its fit and function is acceptable. My dryer is very old (around 31 years old) and this part was approximately half of the OEM price. The as sold new OEM part I am not sure to be exactly like original either. I am happy over all with this product. When an appli...

Review 19: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money The handle on this cheaply-made replacement broke off the first time I attempted to use it.  Don't waste your money.

Review 20: rating 1.0. One Star Did not fit my clothes dryer.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Does not look like the picture The part I received looks NOTHING like like the picture. My original part had metal ribs on each side and was gray (like the picture which is why I ordered it.)  The part I received is a translucent white, no ribs and feels very flimsy.  I'm going to give it the benefit of the doubt and use it. I'll update in six months (unless it doesn't last that long.) It feels very flimsy - I'm not optimistic.

persona: This customer prioritizes a secure, snug fit for specialized use cases like mini cribs, values affordability without compromising on basic functionality, and is willing to accept trade-offs in thickness or noise levels for a cost-effective solution that performs reliably.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Not worth the money or time Within two weeks the adhesive strip failed Review 2: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work well Broken after one time of forgetting to unlock. The freezer side adhesion came off almost immediately. Review 3: rating 1.0. Bad design, not adjustable It doesn't fit worth a darn on a real freezer door. The 3M adhesive does not make enough contact with the base of the freezer. So, it just pulls off. Review 4: rating 5.0. No more toddler in the refrigerator! The gap on our unit is a little bigger than I realized but it still works and was super easy to install(sticks really well) and so far so good with my toddler not opening the refrigerator anymore. Review 5: rating 1.0. Sucky It didn't work with my refrigerator like it said it would Review 6: rating 1.0. Didn’t work for me Elongated piece was too short, so it would not stay attached to refrigerator. Review 7: rating 1.0. Useless They do not work on frig or freezer. Would not stick. Poor design. Both of them broke after just a couple days. Review 8: rating 1.0. Not for all freadge It's not for all freadge,
Very disappointed Review 9: rating 1.0. Was okay at first. It didn't stick to the fridge very well. Worked for like 2 months then kept falling off. Review 10: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money Doesn't stick well. But the biggest problem is that it doesn't actually cover the space between door and fridge. Only about 1/4 in of the fridge piece is able to actually touch the fridge. Waste of my money. 🙄 Review 11: rating 1.0. Would not recommend! Only works if you're gap to cover is about 1 millimeter. Does not work on ours at all, have to buy a different one. Review 12: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work. Doesn’t work. Adhesive isn’t strong enough and the pivoting piece that goes on fridge causes more problems than solved. Review 13: rating 2.0. great for the first week This latch worked great for the first week or so.
I really thought it would be the solution to my fridge door that will not stay shut.
When I installed it I completely cleaned the surface with alcohol and then used the adhesive pad. Again it worked great for about a week.
Now it keeps coming off and I have to block the door closed with a box of books. Review 14: rating 5.0. This product is a game changer for keeping my grandkids out of the fridge. [[VIDEOID:ce4113a41a3de343da0c15154fac2b1e]] Purchased this item to keep my 1yo grandson out of the refrigerator. Received promptly, installation was extremely easy and the adhesion seems to be very strong. There wasn’t any stretching once installed. I also like how it’s not an eye sore on the refrigerator itself very discreet. Review 15: rating 2.0. works..... Updated Review:
Had to knock a few stars off of this. It's been just about 60 days and I came home and found my freezer open. I bought the lock as it had a tendency to not quite close, and stay open a half inch. We'll after 60 days the adhesive gave out and it no longer sticks. It's not under any real pressure so I'm guessing its just terrible adhesive. So I got 60 days of use, and lost a freezer full of food. The locking mechanism is fine, but I can't believe h... Review 16: rating 2.0. Wouldn’t buy again It’s definitely not very strong. Forgot it was there once and didn’t even notice as I opened the fridge. Review 17: rating 2.0. they don't stick the latch itself works well, the problem is the adhesive tape that come with it is crap. it took trying a few different products before I found 1 that would hold (automotive body trim tape by 3M). Review 18: rating 1.0. Not what i expected. Did not fit my fridge and I have the fridge it says works with this lock. The adhesion was ok. I could easily take it off my fridge without any problems after realizing it won't lock my fridge. (It was off by a hair and wouldn't latch. Door sticks out a tip further than the side wall and would not line up right. Off by a hair.) It was easy set up. Review 19: rating 1.0. The sticky sucks I put it on the fridge within 30 minutes no more sticky It sucks sticky only sticks for a few minutes Review 20: rating 1.0. For children under 3 It's ok for small children not for any over 2 years old
reference_output: rating 1.0. Didn't fit It did not fit our freezer door. The gap for the seal was too wide, so it would not mount properly. Returned it.

persona: This customer values authentic, traditional country music with strong vocal performances and meaningful lyrics, showing a preference for artists who embody classic country values and craftsmanship; they are drawn to religious themes and high-quality production, and are less interested in modernized or genre-blending interpretations that stray from established country roots.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. wrapped nicely in red this is a great christmas cd to add to your christmas collection! i didn't know if i would really like this cd or not but i pre-ordered it and hoped. i listened to the free digital copy on the cloud player and it sounded so good. i'm really glad i bought this cd. it will be a great addition to my music collection. i really like her version of run,run rudolph because it is a very jazzy, upbeat song and sounds better than the original version. her new song "4 ... Review 2: rating 3.0. Great voice singing weird mix of songs I love Kelly's voice and was looking forward to adding her songs to my Christmas collection and my all-day Christmas playlist. However, after listening to the album, I'm still trying to figure out what she was trying to do here. Some are sweet, some are classic, some are country, and some defy categorization. So I will pick the ones I like and file the rest. You might want to listen to the samples and just buy the individual MP3s you like. I h... Review 3: rating 5.0. It's a Kelly Christmas I've been a huge fan of Kelly's since first seeing her on American Idol. I have been waiting so long for her to make a Christmas album. I love the varying styles in her singing on this album. It's from soulful (like the title track Wrapped in Red) to fun and poppy (like Baby It's Cold Outside and Underneath the Tree). This album also has 5 original tracks, written by Kelly and her team. My favorite of the 5 original songs is Underneath the Tree. I need to give ... Review 4: rating 5.0. Kelly Clarkson SOARS Her voice is amazing. White Christmas is unbelievable...she absolutely soars. This is a must have. Simply put Kelly Clarkson has the most amazing vocals of anyone out there today. I have been playing the CD all day long. Can't wait to get the Target version because of the two bonus songs Review 5: rating 5.0. Wrapped In Red... AMAZING ALBUM ! I Love this Album, A lot. love the vocal, production, song choice, but I really really want, kelly put Ave Maria and Joy to the world into this album, but nevermind this is great. Goodluck Kelly.... Review 6: rating 3.0. Wanted to like...but This is sad to report because I love Kelly Clarkson, but this holiday CD is average at best. Kelly loses her own voice in Christmas commercialism and its not definitive Kelly. The one song where you can really feel Kelly coming through is her rendition of White Christmas but otherwise this album falls flat. Underneath the Tree is disappointing, way too fast paced. And eeek- why is A Few of My Favorite Things becoming a holiday song staple? Its not a Christmas son... Review 7: rating 5.0. A Classic in the Making! Buy This!! Awesome Christmas/Holiday music from one of the best contemporary female vocalists. There are no missteps on this CD, every song is different, all the music on this record spans genres and showcases Kelly's vocal prowess and songwriting abilities. In fact, her originals, are destined to be heard by everyone, for years to come... Yes, the record is THAT good! Review 8: rating 5.0. Wrapped In Red As a big Kelly Clarkson fan, I had high hopes for this album. And the expectations were met! The "wall of sound" that Greg Kurstin tried to recreate really sounds great. I think Underneath The Tree will be a smash hit for years to come. What really shines other than the covers, are Kelly's Original songs. Usually an artist will do one or two decent original christmas songs when they release a holiday album, but Kelly has 5 really great originals here. Winter Dreams is ... Review 9: rating 5.0. Love It I am very happy with this Christmas CD from Kelly. Her voice sounds amazing as usual. There are some fine selections of classic Christmas songs as well as new songs that I'm sure at least one or two of them will become classics. Great job, Kelly! Review 10: rating 4.0. Christmas from a girl in love! It is obvious the emotions of her recent marriage had an effect on the making of the album. The songs she had a hand in writing are filled with giddy love, and are timeless as well. She brings her personality to the songs, which is what takes a holiday album from good to great. The song "Just for Now" doesn't fit, in my opinion. I think Kelly wanted to bring in the element of the family stress that is part of the holidays, but I'd rather she just sa... Review 11: rating 5.0. Great Old and New Holiday Classics Kelly Clarkson Christmas is what fans have been waiting for and it doesn't disappoint! Many great tracks on this album it is magical and beautiful. Good holiday classics. Review 12: rating 5.0. best Christmas album in ages! well, I guess I dated myself. I haven't bought music in recent years unless it's by Kelly Clarkson. I have all her music, have loved her voice since AI, and this Holiday album does not disappoint in the least! It's already a classic in my extensive Christmas collection. Review 13: rating 5.0. Really Great. One of the best Christmas albums i'v heard in a really long time. Kelly Clarkson is a real talent!!!! love Review 14: rating 5.0. Wrapped in red i love everything she does. Its really different but i still loved it. I am so glad i have this christmas cd of her I will play it always. Review 15: rating 5.0. GREAT CD!!!! Great cd!! I was surprised to read that this is Kelly Clarkson's first Christmas album. It has so many great, new songs that I instantly loved! THIS is a classic right here! Review 16: rating 5.0. COMPLETELY AWESOME! It's not your normal cd!! It's awesome! Listened to the whole album and was blown away by Kelly once more! Love her voice!!!! Review 17: rating 5.0. Excellent Holiday CD! A great blend of upbeat, country and classic songs. Kelly is such an awesome singer! I would highly recommend this CD. Review 18: rating 5.0. Lady in Red! The soulful and emotional style of Kelly gives the holiday songs a heartfelt and warm feeling to the them. Even the classic songs are given her special touch of warmth to a winter song.

I have been a fan since American Idol, and her songs have given several movies a warm and poignant tone to a scene. And I expect to hear some of these holiday songs to tag some holiday movies. Her new marriage may give rise to more family themed songs. Review 19: rating 5.0. Can't go wrong with Kelly Clarkson Not everybody can do a Christmas CD, this is one of the best I've purchased in a long time. She has such a stellar voice, so clear and penetrating! This CD will put you in the Christmas spirt as soon as you play it. Silent Night with the help of Trisha Yearwood and the Queen, Reba Mcentire, is simply beautiful!! I really liked that there were so many classics and she didn't try to change them up, she sang them like they were written. Definitely reco... Review 20: rating 5.0. Excellent Christmas CD! I am very happy with this CD! Great selection of songs...some new and some classics.
If you love Christmas music add this to your collection.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Red She has a good enough voice that she doesn't need to scream - but this is what she does - trying to sound like Aretha Franklin I guess - a poor idol for one so talented.

persona: This customer values convenience, flexibility, and reliability in gift cards, frequently purchasing multi-packs in various denominations to use for last-minute gifts or personal use, with a strong preference for fast delivery and universal Amazon usability.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Ripped Off Card that arrived had a zero balance and showed that it had been used from 2013-2016. Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect way to give a simple gift great impact! This was a gift for my sisters birthday, and she loved it! Now about the tin, besides it being absolutely adorable it was also pretty great quality. No chips or dents! This gave the simple gift of a gift card great impact and made it more personable. Sadly, it isn't repurposable because the hole in the back only has an unsecured piece of plastic covering it. Though I suppose, you could always try to glue the plastic in place. Either w... Review 3: rating 4.0. Cute Box, but it has a hole in the bottom Cute Box! Loved giving the gift card in this cute box! The only negative I can say about it is that it has a rectangular cutout in the bottom so they can program the amount onto the card. I wish that cutout had a clear plastic piece in it so they could use this box to store things in after they use the gift card. Review 4: rating 2.0. not as promised cupcake holder cute, came on time but the card saying who it was from was NOT included!
I had to call the recipient to see if it had been received because she had NO idea who it was from
totally ruined the surprise Review 5: rating 5.0. She lives in Germany so sending that was a great idea! The gift card was a big hit for my daughter-in-law's birthday! She lives to shop on Amazon! She lives in Germany so sending that was a great idea!! Review 6: rating 1.0. Wrong package delivered I sent a gift card for my 3 year old grandson. However some scrapbook item was delivered. They did not know who it was from and did not keep the package it came in. So who knows where the gift card went. I will not sent gift card packages ever again. Review 7: rating 2.0. Tin box dented See the quality of the tin for yourself. I ordered this for someone and I did not have the luxury of time to wait for the replacement to arrive. I was embarrassed when my gift was opened in front of everyone. Review 8: rating 5.0. Simple and cute Cute and simple, perfect gift and is more than just a gift card! Review 9: rating 1.0. Gift card NOT ACTIVATED!!! Purchased as a gift. Recipient called me later to let me know card was never activated. Very disappointed in Amazon. Will never purchase another gift card again!!! I purchased 2 gift cards for the same person and NEITHER ONE WERE ACTIVATED!!!!! Review 10: rating 4.0. Cute & Easy Gift LOVES:
+ Includes the cute Birthday Cupcake Tin
+ Gift card is Super easy to use (you are able to scan it using the camera on your phone; I love this feature and was pleasantly surprised how easy it was!)

THE BADS:
- The gift card was just like a card stock paper instead of the usual plastic gift card
- The black velvet lining holding the gift card was cheaply made: the velvetiness of it was coming off

Overall, I've repurchas... Review 11: rating 5.0. Cute! I couldn't believe this little tin is free! It's very cute. The gift card is thick paper vs plastic and mine was dusty but hard to complain! Definitely reusable. Review 12: rating 1.0. Gift card? The gift card inside didn't say the amount it didn't look like a real gift card Review 13: rating 4.0. She loved it. Not sure if she's used it yet I gave the gift card to my sister for her birthday so she can buy Kindle Books online. She loved it. Not sure if she's used it yet! Review 14: rating 2.0. The recipient received this Amazon Birthday Gift Card, however ... The recipient received this Amazon Birthday Gift Card, however, there was no indication who it was from. It was for my daughter-in-law, she thought it was a scam so she almost threw it out. Luckily I called to find out if she received it and she said she had but there was no information as to who sent it. I did send a message that apparently was not included with he card. Review 15: rating 2.0. Delivery Failure! Ordered this as a birthday gift, in this form to have a keepsake/something to open versus the boring old e-card way. Delivery date was modified upon shipping from 6 days to 18 days! Had to cancel. Review 16: rating 5.0. So cute!! This gift card is so cute!

This cute cupcake tin makes giving gift cards easy and fun! No need to buy a card to put it in! The recipient can take out the insert and use it to hold small items afterward as well!

I would buy this product again and recommend it to others. You simply can not go wrong with a gift card that looks this cute! Review 17: rating 1.0. One Star The tin was conpletely banged up and looked awful. Review 18: rating 1.0. I placed 2 seperate orders for 2 each of your ... I placed 2 seperate orders for 2 each of your $25.00 tins and 2 of the 4 tins were dented when they arrived...the tins themselves were very cute....but I could not give two as is for gifts...I had to put them in something else... Incorrect amount sent. I asked for a $50. ... Incorrect amount sent. I asked for a $50.00 gift card and was sent one with only $25.00. I then had to ask for another $25.00 card.

rating 5.0. Great gifting flexibility with an included free birthday tin card holder These gift card tins are great. The birthday cupcake tin with a padded interior for the card is a nice little extra to affix to a birthday card and does not increase the cost of the gift card. Also, there is flexibility in gifting denomination as the giver can choose whatever amount they wish to gift; the only downside is that the actual physical gift card will not display the amount if you choose something other than the standard $10, $25, $50 denominations.
Couple the one-day shipping with the fact that these gift cards can be put toward just about anything the recipient could possibly want and these are a great option for a last minute gift or a gift for someone who is difficult to shop for.

persona: This customer values unique, personalized gifts that convey thoughtfulness and emotional connection, prioritizing craftsmanship and meaningful presentation over price, and is highly likely to purchase items that serve as memorable, heartfelt tokens for others.

persona: This customer prioritizes product durability and reliable functionality, and is likely to avoid brands or products with a history of early failure, especially those affecting core performance.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. This product was recommended by Amazon so I am very disappointed WyFun Oral Hygiene replacement hand hose kit for waterPic 100w :Both plastic sprockets that hold hose in place broke off so that water from the reservoir comes out from the bottom instead of going through the hose. This product was recommended by Amazon so I am very disappointed. I purchased it about two and a half months ago. Review 2: rating 1.0. NOT ACCEPTABLE This is counterfeit junk not OEM Does not fit the cradle on the base correctly and cannot switch off on the handle. You must keep the button on the handle depressed to stop the flow and switch off on the base-----button on the handle basically useless. Review 3: rating 2.0. Water leaking This fits our Watepik and works fine, but I’ve been noticing it is turning yellow in the creases and leaking water from the tube attachment to the handheld part. I use distilled water to waterpik, so I’m thinking it’s leaking inside and staining. It’s only been a little over a month. Review 4: rating 5.0. Works great! I bought this for husband since his original (model wp-100) waterpik hose had gotten a small hole for some reason. Instead of buying a new system,I figured I'd just buy the hose since that's the only part that didn't work well and this hose works great! It was super easy to replace all you need is a screwdriver, and its a lot more cheaper than buying a whole new system. It's the same length as the original one that came with the actual system and works just as well. He ... Review 5: rating 1.0. Does not turn off Cannot turn off the water spray. Review 6: rating 1.0. Junk, failed in weeks Bought this one based on price. That was a mistake. It worked just fine for the first few weeks, and then, like other reviewers here, it started leaking under the unit. Just outside the Amazon return window, and the seller will not honor their warranty. Spend the extra and buy the real Waterpik unit! Review 7: rating 2.0. Instantly sprays when you turn the water pic on The normal water pic nozzle does not spray until you press the button. This one sprays instantly unless you hold the button in. If you are not ready you will have a wet bathroom. There is no notice that the replacement functions differently than the original. I do not like surprises. Review 8: rating 3.0. Product is OK ... but Reduced Water Pressure Not a bad price but definitely does not work with WaterPik WP-100. Inside diameter of tube is too small and greatly diminishes water pressure. Probably works fine with other WaterPik models. Review 9: rating 5.0. Great replacement head for my WaterPik I was very happy with this product which fixed my WaterPik. I left my curling iron by the water tube and it had to be replaced. I was glad I could repair it with this replacement. The only drawback was that you have to hold the button on the water spray head down if you want it to stay off. Review 10: rating 5.0. works well this is fine and cheaper than the brand name from the distributor. don't throw away the thin plastic valve? between the product and the unit. the trick is not to tighten the screws too much. leakage is prevented by the o ring, not by tightening the screws. the only point of the screws is to keep the o ring from popping out. the plastic is tender, and if you crack it, your product will be useless. Review 11: rating 1.0. Broke in 2 weeks. Broke within 2 weeks of install. No idea if single item defect or just inferior product overall. This was to replace a manufacturer replacement which lasted a year. Review 12: rating 1.0. Awful expensive. Poor quality. Installation is inconvenient. Sprayed me all over the water! Awful! Review 13: rating 1.0. UPDATE : pinched hose - again ! extending life of this fine product, blue button/shutoff had got stuck on old one, was about to order an entire new unit. -- FOLLOW-UP : Hose arrived pinched about 2" below handle. Since I have only been using the #4 setting, I cranked it up to #8 to produce the #4 equivalent output rather than going through the returns process. Works for me.

ALAS - the blockage got progressively worse, ultimately necessitated ordering a replacemen... Review 14: rating 2.0. OK, but leaks This fit, but leaks around the handle. Review 15: rating 2.0. I'm very disappointed in this I'm very disappointed in this. This is the 3rd. replacement I've purchased in the last several years and have always been happy with it. I guess this one must be made by different material as even after it's been used many time it still gives the water a horrible taste. It also leaks water at the bottom of the hand held unit. Unfortunately I didn't keep the package long enough to return it. Review 16: rating 1.0. Marginal performance Unit was easy to install but did not replace the original’s performance. Update after 3 weeks of use. Couldn't stand the low water flow so ordered a new handle directly from Waterpik for a few extra dollars. I tested the 2 handles. The generic (WyFun) handle passed 250... persona: This customer is highly engaged with niche content, consistently renews subscriptions for specialized magazines, and values in-depth, expert-driven insights and authoritative information that enhance their expertise and enjoyment of specific interests.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Fun and Informative Magazine I've been subscribing to WIRED for a couple of years now. It is a great magazine with a very interesting mix of intelligently written articles. It's not filled with pure techie articles, and it hits a very broad spectrum of topics. I'll keep my subscription going for a long time. For $10 a year it can't be beat. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great Magazine Currently my favorite magazine. It focuses on technology and its effect on society. So you get more diverse articles (art, music, movies, etc.) than some purely science based magazines. Review 3: rating 3.0. Maybe I'm Too Old Though I am pretty tech savy at an older age, much of what Wired covers is over my head. I realize that much of it is science focused, so I give it to my son-in-law. He loves it. Review 4: rating 1.0. Please, few weeks I sed I dont want to renew the subscription to Wired magazine!! Please, few weeks I sed I dont want to renew the subscription to Wired magazine!! Review 5: rating 1.0. ripoff This business of automatically renewing a magazine and making it difficult to cancel is the reason I will never buy a subscription from Amazon again Review 6: rating 1.0. Don't purchase here Good magazine, but if you are an international subscriber, don't purchase here. I am still waiting for my 1st issue (I took advantage of the $10/year offer in January 2011). I indicated to Amazon.com and to Wired that I haven't received the first issue which was to be delivered by March, and got a reply from Wired that my subscription is only for 2 issues. Needless to say, I am trying to cancel the subscription and want a refund. Review 7: rating 1.0. WIRED Magazine subscription Cannot review this Amazon purchase because the subscription takes 4 to 6 weeks to process, i.e. 4 to 6 weeks before my first magazine shows up. Why does it take 4 to 6 weeks to process a magazine subscription? Review 8: rating 2.0. Canceled Too many meaningless articles about internet fluff. Meant to make you feel like you are "in" the crowd.
Technical errors abound.
Hardware reviews are constantly for things only the 1% can afford or would want.
Insulting, dumb, useless writing much too often.

Occasional interesting article, so two stars, but not worth the subscription. Review 9: rating 5.0. Not a Tech Person, but This Mag Is Awesome Last year, we subscribed to six or seven magazines. Wired was one of the two subscriptions that were renewed. I'm not a "tech" person and, initially, I ordered this for my husband, but I have become hooked. This mag combines investigative reporting with the latest developments in science and technology - and it's presented in a manner that is understandable by the average person without a degree in computer science. I truly read every single... Review 10: rating 4.0. Digital subscription included I've been a WIRED reader for years - since at least 1995. The best thing they've done is include the digital version of the magazine in the price of the paper subscription. I don't even read the paper magazine anymore - it goes straight into the recycle bin.

I LOVE being able to have a bunch of issues of WIRED on my iPad and reading it that way. For me it's so much easier to read on the go than to sit down with a magazine, plus I really lik... Review 11: rating 2.0. Haven't gotten it yet This is a great magizine. But I ordered it on 12/11/2012 and my first issue has not arrived yet. I would hope that it will arrive at my address by the end of the month.
Other then all that. The price I snagged it at in the deal of day was great :) Review 12: rating 5.0. Hooked on Wired Love the Wired mag. It's a great day when the postman delivers my monthly Wired magazine. It always arrives in clean and in great condition wrapped in plastic. The cover and insert pages are thick and textured...makes for a great reading experience. The printed subscription comes with an iPad reader as well but I prefer to hold the warm periodical and share stories of interest of others by passing it on. Easy read, quick articles, relevant advertisements, handy gu... Review 13: rating 5.0. Want to be a fortune teller? This magazine is the best way to learn of new technology that will change the way computers and advanced machine will be operating in the near future. 3D printers are the future. It where we are going in the near future. Can you imagine a printer that is building parts for the latest Airbus airplanes. The military is print parts that would cost many time what contractors would bid. Where did I find this out? Wired. Review 14: rating 4.0. Still my favorite magazine. The only thing I would really like Wired to improve is their access to the digital version. I've been a happy subscriber for years, which means I can access the digital version as well as the print that is delivered to my house. Problem is, I don't own an iPad or a Nook; since I have a Nexus 7 I appear to be out of luck. This just doesn't seem right and I hope they resolve it very soon. Review 15: rating 5.0. every copy of Wired that you read makes you smarter the best magazine in the entire world. they have everything that any human could ever ask for! there is no need for you to go and read reviews about it, just get it.

NOTE!!! BEWARE!

i'm not going to sugar coat it for you. this magazine is for smart people. you may not enjoy it or like it at all if Tech Ninja stuff is not your thing, or if you got/get bad grades in science.

-The KbloodyK Review 16: rating 5.0. The only actual paper magazine I read Given that you can get any and all information from the web and in real time I have dumped all my magazines or switched to digital versions. Wired is the one I can not let go of. For anyone why loves technology this is the newsweek equivalent. It is packed with great articles. Review 17: rating 5.0. Made an excellent gift! Bought this as a gift for my father in law because he liked that it was not as in depth as some other tech magazines and it was perfect! Review 18: rating 5.0. Worth every nickle and more ! I had purchased an item from Amazon and was offered Wired on a Special Offer. I thought, "What the heck"! Glad I took the bait. Thank YOU, Amazon!

Wired HAS to be one of the most interesting magazines I have read in my sixty-six years. I read it front to back. Occasionally, an article my not be within my scope of interest, but by and large, most articles are interesting. Normally, the main cover article is the longest...but it is also the best... Review 19: rating 5.0. Great mag! I gave "Wired" 5 stars, because there was no 6th star! This has been my fav mag for many years. If you like or work in the electronic field this can't be beat! With the last issue I was given a free electronic mag. which is great also. Review 20: rating 5.0. Great Read This is one of the best magazines out there if you want to stay on top of all the cool things happening in the world.
reference_output: rating 5.0. only magazine I keep renewing!!! great overall tech info in a magazine..interesting and insightful
